scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @autonomy-studio/shared build && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @autonomy-studio/server dev" "pnpm --filter @autonomy-studio/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @autonomy-studio/shared build && pnpm --filter @autonomy-studio/server build && pnpm --filter @autonomy-studio/web build
